description: Proportion of engagement that is meeting-based vs email-based. Meetings represent deeper, higher-commitment engagement. Accounts with high meeting ratios are in real conversations, not surface-level email exchanges. Key differentiator from raw engagement score — two accounts at engagement 70 look identical, but one with 45% meetings and one with 5% meetings are fundamentally different prospects.
coaching_text: Above 0.40 = deep engagement, meetings dominate — strong buying signal. 0.20-0.40 = balanced mix. Below 0.20 = email-heavy, low commitment engagement — may be responsive but not actively evaluating.

_meta.why: Engagement score treats all activity equally. This metric distinguishes high-commitment engagement (meetings) from low-commitment (email). Closed-won accounts typically show 35-50% meeting ratios.
